title: reseda phyteuma subsp. rupestris
intro: Reseda phyteuma subsp. rupestris, also known as rock reseda, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, due to its adaptogenic properties, and may also help to support respiratory health by reducing coughs and congestion. Reseda phyteuma subsp. rupestris can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil for its medicinal uses, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
